query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "kvarn: variance-normalized kv-cache quantization mitigates error accum" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the same core mechanism (KV-cache or activation quantization in large models) and domain (LLM/video-model inference) as the user's question, specifically addressing error accumulation and quality degradation under low-bit quantization (W4A4) using techniques like outlier smoothing that are directly relevant to the "Variance-Normalized" approach in the user's reference paper.
